description: Free or low-cost health coverage. NY expanded Medicaid under the ACA and offers the Essential Plan for those just above the Medicaid limit.

eligibility.notes: Children may qualify for Child Health Plus up to 400% FPL. Essential Plan covers adults 138-200% FPL with $0-20/month premiums.

apply_in_person: Visit a NYC HRA office or call NY State of Health at 1-855-355-5777.
how_to_apply: Apply online at NY State of Health, by phone at 1-855-355-5777, or in person at an HRA office or navigator site.
citation: 42 USC 1396a(a)(10); 42 CFR 435; NY Social Services Law Article 5, Title 11
